requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan's EV market is nascent and may contain a mixed vehicle population, including Chinese imports using GB/T and imported vehicles expecting IEC 62196 Type 2 AC or CCS2 DC. For public, tendered, internationally financed, or mixed-fleet deployments, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC is the more internationally interoperable direction and should be confirmed in the site or procurement specification. GB/T presence in the region should be noted honestly, but it should not be treated as a substitute where IEC 62196 / CCS2 is specified.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦电动车市场仍处于早期，车辆构成可能混合，包括使用GB/T的中国进口车辆，以及预期IEC 62196 Type 2交流或CCS2直流接口的进口车辆。对公共、招标、国际融资或混合车队部署而言，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2是更具国际互操作性的方向，应在站点或采购规格中确认。区域内存在GB/T应如实说明，但在规格要求IEC 62196 / CCS2时，GB/T不能作为替代。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦電動車市場仍處於早期，車輛構成可能混合，包括使用GB/T的中國進口車輛，以及預期IEC 62196 Type 2交流或CCS2直流接口的進口車輛。對公共、招標、國際融資或混合車隊部署而言，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2是更具國際互操作性的方向，應在站點或採購規格中確認。區域內存在GB/T應如實說明，但在規格要求IEC 62196 / CCS2時，GB/T不能作為替代。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS2 / Combo 2 configuration
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project, fleet, tender, or charge-point-operator connector specification

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T AC connector resembles Type 2 in outline but differs in connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement. GB/T DC uses a different geometry and GB/T 27930 CAN communication, whereas CCS2 projects rely on the IEC / CCS communication stack. A GB/T-only charger is therefore physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口外形近似Type 2，但在接口性别、信号和触点排列上不同。GB/T直流接口采用不同几何形状和GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而CCS2项目依赖IEC / CCS通信栈。因此，仅支持GB/T的充电桩与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和电气上不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口外形近似Type 2，但在接口性別、信號和觸點排列上不同。GB/T直流接口採用不同幾何形狀和GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而CCS2項目依賴IEC / CCS通訊棧。因此，僅支持GB/T的充電樁與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和電氣上不兼容。

gap.en: Confirm the required connector standard before quotation. If the Kyrgyzstan project requires IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2, conversion from a China GB/T SKU requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable set, locking device, proximity / control pilot behavior, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, and temperature-rise evidence. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliance substitute unless the project owner expressly accepts them.
gap.zh: 报价前应确认所需接口标准。若吉尔吉斯斯坦项目要求IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，从中国GB/T SKU转换需要重新设计耦合器、线缆组件、锁止装置、接近/控制导引行为、直流通信栈、标签、备件和温升证据。除非项目业主明确接受，转接器不应作为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 報價前應確認所需接口標準。若吉爾吉斯斯坦項目要求IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，從中國GB/T SKU轉換需要重新設計耦合器、線纜組件、鎖止裝置、接近/控制導引行為、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件和溫升證據。除非項目業主明確接受，轉接器不應作為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2, CCS2, GB/T, multi-standard heads, or a specific connector mix is required by tender, fleet, charge-point operator, or site owner
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kyrgyzstan may see GB/T chargers because of China proximity, but IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 projects require real connector and protocol redesign from a GB/T-only China charger. Confirm the fleet and project connector mix before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 因靠近中国，吉尔吉斯斯坦可能出现GB/T充电桩，但IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2项目要求GB/T-only中国充电桩进行真实接口和协议重新设计。出货前须确认车队和项目接口组合。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 因靠近中國，吉爾吉斯斯坦可能出現GB/T充電樁，但IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2項目要求GB/T-only中國充電樁進行真實接口和協議重新設計。出貨前須確認車隊和項目接口組合。
